mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, subject_id, session_branch, session_type, status, total_questions, correct_count, incorrect_count, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM study_session ORDER BY id

SELECT id, user_id, subject_id, session_branch, session_type, status, total_questions, correct_count, incorrect_count, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM study_session WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, subject_id, session_branch, session_type, status, total_questions, correct_count, incorrect_count, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM study_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_session (user_id, subject_id, session_branch, session_type, status, total_questions, correct_count, incorrect_count, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{sessionBranch}, #{sessionType}, #{status}, #{totalQuestions}, #{correctCount}, #{incorrectCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE study_session SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, session_branch = #{sessionBranch}, session_type = #{sessionType}, status = #{status}, total_questions = #{totalQuestions}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, incorrect_count = #{incorrectCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
